# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

---
apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: webservice
  namespace: app-ns
spec:
  replicas: 3 # number of pods to run for the service
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      name: webapp
      role: web
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        name: webapp
        role: web
    spec:
      containers:
      - image: my-webapp-image # tag and repository of the app
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        name: web
        ports:
          - containerPort: 80
            protocol: TCP

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  labels:
    name: cache-service
    role: cache
  name: cache-svc
spec: # use selector to map the service to a set of pods
  type: ClusterIP
  ports: 
    - port: 2000
      targetPort: 30145 # target port is the port exposed by the pod that the service should be able to reach 
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: background-worker
  namespace: app-ns
spec:
  replicas: 2 
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      name: bg-worker
      role: bgw
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        name: bg-worker
        role: bgw
    spec:
      containers:
        - image: my-bgworker-image # tag and repository of the app
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          name: bg-worker
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: bg-worker-svc # service to expose bg workers to outside world 
  labels:
    name: bg-workers
    role: bgw
  namespace: app-ns  
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports: 
    - port: 30145
      targetPort: 2000 
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-svc # service for the memcached pod to be accessible from outside world 
  labels:
    name: cache-service 
    role: cache 
  namespace: app-ns  
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports: 
    - port: 30145
      targetPort: 2000 
      protocol: TCP
